executive_summary: Build failure analysis for attempt 3 reveals critical configuration errors preventing GitHub Actions workflow execution. The workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is not accessible or does not exist in the repository, resulting in HTTP 404 errors when attempting to dispatch the workflow. This is a blocking issue that prevents any build execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/dispatch the workflow, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Missing GitHub Actions Workflow Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the required GitHub Actions workflow configuration file that defines the build pipeline. Without this file, automated builds cannot be triggered.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The .github/workflows directory may not exist, or the build.yml file has not been created in the repository. This is a prerequisite for GitHub Actions automation.
errors.impact: Prevents automated CI/CD pipeline execution. Manual intervention required to create workflow configuration before any builds can proceed.

errors.title: GitHub Actions API Authentication or Permission Issue
errors.description: The GitHub API token may lack the required 'workflow' or 'actions' permissions needed to dispatch workflows, or GitHub Actions may be disabled at the repository or organization level.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled
errors.root_cause: The authentication token used for API calls may not have the 'workflow' scope enabled, which is required to trigger workflow dispatches. Alternatively, GitHub Actions may be disabled in repository settings.
errors.impact: Even if workflow files exist, builds cannot be triggered programmatically. Requires token regeneration with proper scopes or enabling GitHub Actions in repository settings.

steps: Create build.yml file with Maven build configuration
Configure build steps: checkout, setup-java, maven build
Commit and push the workflow file to the main branch
Navigate to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
If missing, regenerate token with required scopes: repo, workflow, actions
Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure classified as CONFIGURATION_ERROR due to missing workflow file. No code compilation or testing was attempted. Issue is infrastructure-related.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Issue is configuration-only.
compliance_notes.compliance_status: BLOCKED - Cannot proceed with compliance checks until build infrastructure is operational.
